headline: J.B. Hunt Record Quarter Highlights Intermodal Strength And New Growth Push
summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NasdaqGS:JBHT) reported record first quarter results, supported by strong intermodal volume growth. The company highlighted effective cost reduction initiatives that contributed to improved margins and profitability. Management outlined a shift from a defensive posture to an offensive market strategy, aiming to capture opportunities in a recovering freight market. J.B. Hunt Transport Services, a major player in North American freight transportation and...
